decision_commentary: CRITICAL TC-009 CHECK: coastal_zone_permit (SEMARNAT ZOFEMAT) present in required_documents — PASS. wind_load_study present in required_documents — PASS. No auto-fail triggered. Three documents correctly identified: (1) Topographic Survey (standard, always required), (2) SEMARNAT Coastal Zone Permit (critical for coastal Pacific site at scrub-to-sand edge in BCS), (3) Wind Load Study (required for strong prevailing coastal wind conditions). required_documents array, request_sent_at, current_status, and blockers all present. Accuracy is excellent — no over-requesting, no under-requesting given coastal site conditions. Clarity scored 4 (not 5) because rationale is excellent but deadline for client document delivery is not specified in the JSON — client receives clear document specs and rationale but no explicit deadline date. State sync scored 4 — Asana GID 1213707403933299 confirmed in state.json (site_readiness task). blockers array is empty (documents not yet received, which is appropriate for a request-sent status).
celia_routing_notes: N/A — site-readiness-report is a Sol deliverable; not a Celia gate deliverable.
